narrative:
Thompson Twp township has 536 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.0 percentage points.
